name: Salesforce
description: Salesforce provides a comprehensive suite of APIs to programmatically access and manipulate CRM data, manage metadata, and integrate with external systems.
auth_method: OAuth 2.0 (Web Server, User-Agent, JWT Bearer, Username-Password flows), Session ID, SAML
api_surface: REST, SOAP, Bulk, Streaming (Pub/Sub), GraphQL, Metadata, Tooling
buildability_verdict: Highly buildable with comprehensive, well-documented APIs, free developer environments (Developer Edition), and robust SDKs.

name: GitHub
description: GitHub's REST API enables developers to manage repositories, users, organizations, pull requests, issues, and workflows programmatically.
auth_method: OAuth 2.0, Personal Access Tokens (PAT), and GitHub App installation tokens
api_surface: REST API with JSON payloads, supporting standard HTTP methods (GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE)
buildability_verdict: Excellent. Highly documented with comprehensive OpenAPI specifications, SDKs, and extensive community support.

name: Notion
description: Notion's API allows developers to connect Notion pages and databases to other tools, automate workflows, and build custom integrations by programmatically interacting with workspace data.
buildability_verdict: Highly buildable with comprehensive documentation, official SDKs, and an interactive API reference.

name: Stripe
description: Stripe provides a comprehensive suite of APIs for online payment processing, subscription management, invoicing, and financial services.
buildability_verdict: Highly buildable, widely considered the gold standard of developer documentation and API design with extensive SDK support.
